mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment (payment_key, order_id, amount, status, method, approved_at) VALUES (#{paymentKey}, #{orderId}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{method}, #{approvedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT payment_id AS paymentId, payment_key AS paymentKey, order_id AS orderId, amount, status, method, approved_at AS approvedAt FROM payment WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
